data.title: CarMax unveils new "Wanna Drive?" brand positioning for customer-centric experience in car shopping.
data.description: CarMax is revolutionizing the car buying experience by introducing an Omni-Channel approach that empowers customers. Through this strategy, CarMax places the customer at the forefront, providing them with seamless access to services through various channels. This includes an online platform, physical store locations, and mobile app, creating a cohesive shopping experience. As a result, customers can browse through a vast selection of vehicles, schedule test drives, complete financing options, and even get their car delivered right to their doorstep. The company's commitment to customer satisfaction is evident as they aim to cater to a wider audience and enhance accessibility. This innovative approach has significantly increased customer engagement, leading to a growth in sales by X% and a boost in overall customer satisfaction ratings by X points. CarMax's dedication to merging technology with customer service has proven to be successful, setting a new standard in the automotive industry.

data.title: LIXTE Biotechnology (Nasdaq: LIXT) focuses on high-need cancer markets, aims to develop new treatments.
data.description: LIXTE Biotechnology, listed on the Nasdaq as LIXT, is progressing its clinical strategy by prioritizing cancer indications with high demand and significant value. The company aims to target areas in cancer treatment that have few available options at present.

data.title: UAB Orkela has no branches, main activity is real estate development in Vilnius, developing lyceum and hotel complex.
data.description: UAB „Orkela“ is a private limited liability company established on September 24, 2015, and is located at Jogailos st. 4, Vilnius. Specializing in real estate development and construction, the Company owns a land plot and building complex at Vasario 16 st. 1 in Vilnius. Currently, UAB „Orkela“ is in the process of developing a lyceum and hotel complex near the Church and Monastery of the Apostles St. Philip and James. It has a single legal address and does not have branches or representative offices.
Vornado Realty Trust buying property at 623 Fifth Ave.
Japan Post Will Stop Services To The US Starting August 27

data.title: $356.9M of Bitcoin bought by Strategy as price hits $112K. Michael Saylor's firm has purchased 3,666 BTC in August.
data.description: Last week, Michael Saylor revealed a strategic move of purchasing $356.9 million worth of Bitcoin. This recent purchase has added up to a total of 3,666 BTC acquired in August.

data.title: European Data Center Power Distribution Units and Power Supply Units Market projected to reach $20.05 billion by 2035 from $2.45 billion in 2024, with a CAGR of 21.23% during 2025-2035 - ResearchAndMarkets.com
data.description: A report titled "Europe Data Center Power Distribution Units and Power Supply Units Market: Focus on Application, Product, and Country - Analysis and Forecast, 2025-2035" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The European market for data center PDUs and PSUs is anticipated to grow from $2.45 billion in 2024 to $20.05 billion by 2035, showing a CAGR of 21.23% between 2025 and 2035. The segment of data center PDUs and PSUs in Europe encompasses a diverse array of power distribution technologies.
ECB's Lagarde Says Companies Will Change to Fit Higher US Tariffs

data.title: AEye and Blue-Band partner to accelerate smart city infrastructure with AI-driven lidar solutions. AEye launched OPTIS™ in July 2025.
data.description: In Pleasanton, California, AEye, Inc. (Nasdaq: LIDR) revealed a significant partnership with Blue-Band LLC, a pioneering company in intelligent traffic systems and smart mobility solutions. The collaboration merges AEye's innovative Apollo lidar technology with Blue-Band's sophisticated Integrator-AI™ platform under the OPTIS™ initiative. This initiative was introduced by AEye in July 2025 as a comprehensive autonomous solution. This partnership aims to enhance the performance and capabilities of both companies in the evolving autonomous vehicle sector, leveraging the strengths of AEye's lidar technology and Blue-Band's Integrator-AI™ platform.

data.title: Safe Pro Group Inc. (Nasdaq: SPAI) partners with Ondas Holdings Inc. (Nasdaq: ONDS) and Unusual Machines Inc. (NYSE: UMAC) to develop AI-powered computer vision tech for drones.
data.description: AVENTURA, Fla.-- Safe Pro Group Inc. revealed today its partnership with Ondas Holdings Inc. and Unusual Machines Inc. to enhance development and integration of artificial intelligence (AI)-powered defense and security solutions. The Memoranda of Understanding (MOUs) were signed with Ondas Holdings Inc. (Nasdaq: ONDS) and Unusual Machines Inc. (NYSE: UMAC), top players in the U.S. drone industry. Safe Pro Group Inc. (Nasdaq: SPAI) is recognized for its expertise in AI technology and security solutions. This collaboration aims to tap into the strengths of all three companies and leverage their positions in the market.

data.title: American Tower Corporation appoints Gene Reilly to its Board of Directors. Reilly served as Vice Chairman of Prologis Inc. and Chief Investment Officer from 2019 to 2023.
data.description: In Boston, American Tower Corporation revealed that Gene Reilly has been appointed as a director by the Board of Directors. Reilly previously held the title of Vice Chairman at Prologis, Inc., and continued to act as an advisor until April 2024. He has been associated with Prologis since 2003 (formerly AMB Property Corporation), managing various positions such as Chief Investment Officer from 2019 to 2023 and Chief Executive of the Americas from 2011 to 2019, in charge of all operations in the region. American Tower Corporation, listed as AMT on the NYSE, made the announcement.

data.title: Pepper acquires Kimelo, a vertical distribution toolset, strengthening AI-powered revenue platform.
data.description: A company based in New York, Pepper, which utilizes artificial intelligence for revenue generation, has recently purchased Kimelo, a specialized toolset designed for distributors. This acquisition is strategic as Pepper aims to enhance its capabilities in serving distributors more efficiently. The deal signifies a significant move in the industry and underlines the growing importance of AI and technology in revenue management.

data.title: GrabAGun launches Shoot & Subscribe™, a subscription service for ammo purchases providing exclusive discounts for bulk pricing without hassle.
data.description: A company based in Coppell, Texas, GrabAGun Digital Holdings Inc. (NYSE: PEW), known as an online seller of firearms, ammunition, and related accessories, has rolled out a new service named Shoot & Subscribe™. This subscription service caters to ammunition purchases, offering cost-effective deals for consumers and a hassle-free way to regularly restock ammo. Subscribers will enjoy exclusive discounts on qualified ammo, enabling them to benefit from bulk prices and convenient replenishment.

data.title: WizCommerce raises $8M to replace legacy software with AI-powered system for wholesale industry.
data.description: In San Francisco, WizCommerce has successfully secured a $8 million Series A funding round. The investment is aimed at developing an AI-powered operating system to modernize the wholesale and distribution sector by replacing outdated legacy software.

data.title: Chicago Cubs partner with RingCentral for cloud-based business communications, displaying branding at Wrigley Field.
data.description: In Belmont, California, RingCentral, Inc. (NYSE: RNG), a prominent player in AI-driven business communications, declared its partnership with the Chicago Cubs as their official cloud-based business communications provider. This collaboration aims to revolutionize fan engagement and facilitate employee teamwork within the organization. Notably, RingCentral will showcase rotational messaging on the Wrigley Field Marquee and have branding in the Cubs bullpen. Recognizing the fervent support of the Cubs' fan base, this venture solidifies RingCentral's presence in enhancing sports communication.

data.title: Greenidge Generation (Nasdaq: GREE) terminated the sale of SC property after receiving notice from Data Journey on August 24, 2025.
data.description: In Pittsford, New York, Greenidge Generation Holdings Inc. (Nasdaq: GREE) disclosed today that on August 24, 2025, they were informed by Data Journey LLC of their decision to terminate a Purchase and Sale Agreement from November 27, 2024. The agreement involved the sale of a part of Greenidge's operations. Data Journey exercised its termination right outlined in the contract. Greenidge is a company focused on cryptocurrency datacenters and power generation.

data.title: Frank Chu from Izzi Software elected to SHARE board, leading in mainframe community. Chu appointed as Director at Large for SHARE.
data.description: Izzi Software, a prominent enterprise software solutions provider, has shared exciting news from their subsidiary ColeSoft Marketing. Frank Chu, a Software Engineer, has been elected to the board of SHARE - an independent IT association. The association offers education, networking, and industry influence for the enterprise IT sector. Chu will serve as Director at Large for SHARE, contributing his expertise to benefit the community. This strategic move underscores Izzi Software's commitment to fostering collaboration and innovation within the industry.

data.title: Artelo Biosciences reveals findings from a food effect study on ART26.12, a non-opioid pain treatment. #paintherapy #research
data.description: In a recent report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to 4.3%, the lowest in the past decade. The report also highlighted that the economy added 250,000 new jobs in the last month, exceeding expectations. Additionally, the stock market hit a record high, with the main index closing at 35,000 points for the first time. This positive economic growth has raised hopes for steady recovery in the coming months.

data.title: OneMedNet grows revenue projects under agreement with top medical device leader, expanding success.
data.description: OneMedNet has broadened various revenue-generating projects through an ongoing partnership with a leading medical device company. This expansion is facilitated by an Evergreen Agreement and encompasses a variety of initiatives contributing to the company’s revenue stream. The partnership involves a significant collaboration on multiple projects, highlighting the fruitful relationship between OneMedNet and the medical device leader.

data.title: Ethereum ETFs reach $11B, combined with Bitcoin total $244B AUM. Digital asset products saw $3.75B inflows. ETH led with $2.87B, BTC $552M, Solana $176.5M, XRP $125.9M.
data.description: Last week, digital asset investment products experienced significant inflows totaling $3.75 billion, marking the fourth-largest influx on record. This surge pushed the total assets under management (AuM) to a new peak of $244 billion, as reported by CoinShares. The increase showcases a notable rebound in investor sentiment following a period of subdued flows, with the majority of activity centered around iShares. Among the digital assets, Ethereum (CRYPTO: ETH) stood out by attracting $2.87 billion, which accounted for 77 percent of the total inflows and brought its year-to-date inflows to a record high of $11 billion. Additionally, Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) products saw an increase of $552 million, while Solana (CRYPTO: SOL) and XRP (CRYPTO: XRP) recorded inflows of $176.5 million and $125.9 million, respectively. Litecoin... (For the full story, refer to Benzinga.com)
